## Why It Works

This template strikes a balance between simplicity and depth, making it memorable and highly shareable. It provides an interesting perspective on intelligence and wisdom, inspiring people to not just adapt to their circumstances but to evolve in their thinking and approach to life and business challenges.

## Template

Smart people [action], but wise people [enhanced action].

## Example

Smart people save money, but wise people invest it.
